dj_text: In the multiverse where Sherlock BBC (Medieval version) won, Badinerie (Medieval | Bardcore Style) is the punishment. Welcome.
commercial_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm. Yeah. That's... that's the smooth.
hijack_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm.
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: Badinerie (Medieval | Bardcore Style)
